creator: kodcode@gmx.com
text:
A few outdated pieces of information on the website:

Digital Ocean does not offer Droplets with FreeBSD anymore.

The user community in Israel is not responsive, the link to their website is dead, and so is their email address dead.

If you are looking to establish a group in Israel, I would be delighted to be part of it.

Many thanks,
EMM
kodcode
